items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #2' aims to confirm the behavior of the system when an extension is uninstalled. However, there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates the outcome of this scenario or any related functionality. The prior steps focus on customer sign-ups and bookings but do not address the specific scenario of extension uninstallation, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the expected behavior.
